vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-496: gh issue view fails in workspace due to projects classic deprecation warning

plan.title: gh issue view fails in workspace due to projects classic deprecation warning
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: gh issue view without --json exits non-zero due to GitHub Projects (classic) deprecation warning, breaking agent workflows that rely on the exit code
narratives.Proposal: Update all skill files to use --json with gh issue view, and add a CLAUDE.md note to prevent future regressions

items.title: Update plan skill to use --json with gh issue view

narrative.Action: In skills/plan/SKILL.md line ~63, change `gh issue view <number>` to `gh issue view <number> --json title,body,state,labels,assignees`. Update .claude/skills/plan/SKILL.md mirror to match.

subItems.title: skills/plan/SKILL.md no longer contains bare `gh issue view` without --json

items.title: Update github-cli skill to use --json and document deprecation

narrative.Action: In skills/github-cli/SKILL.md lines ~47-51, update examples to prefer --json. Add a note about the Projects (classic) deprecation causing non-zero exits without --json. Update .claude/skills/github-cli/SKILL.md mirror.

subItems.title: github-cli SKILL.md examples use --json for gh issue view
Deprecation warning is documented in the skill

items.title: Add CLAUDE.md note about gh issue view --json requirement

narrative.Action: Add a brief section to root CLAUDE.md noting that `gh issue view` must always use `--json` to avoid the Projects (classic) deprecation warning causing non-zero exit codes.

subItems.title: CLAUDE.md contains a note about always using --json with gh issue view
